description: Production API: Create virtual_genesis/api/ package with REST API using Python's built-in http.server (NO external deps). Includes endpoints for task submission, session management, system status, and health check. LLM integration via OpenRouter with mock fallback. Session management with lifecycle. New legitimate thefts 5.63 (OpenRouter Multi-Model Routing) and 5.64 (Session-Based Architecture).
steps: Create virtual_genesis/api/__init__.py with package docstring and __all__ exports.

Create virtual_genesis/api/config.py with APIConfig dataclass: model_mapping (tier_0='nousresearch/nous-capybara-7b:free', tier_1='openai/gpt-3.5-turbo', tier_2='openai/gpt-4'), governance_flags dict (all False by default), memory_limits, decay_rates, api_host/port settings.

Create virtual_genesis/api/llm_adapter.py with LLMAdapter class: __init__(api_key=None) reads OPENROUTER_API_KEY from env, generate(prompt, model_tier='tier_1', temperature=0.7) -> str method that calls OpenRouter API via urllib.request when api_key is set, falls back to mock_generate() when no key. Mock mode returns deterministic responses based on prompt hash. Include proper error handling.

Create virtual_genesis/api/session.py with Session class: id, created_at, state (active/consolidating/closed), memory_store (InMemoryMemoryStore), concept_registry (InMemoryConceptRegistry), theory_registry (InMemoryTheoryRegistry), identity (AgentIdentityObject). SessionManager class with create_session(), get_session(id), end_session(id) that triggers consolidation (apply_forgetting_policy). Track active sessions.

Create virtual_genesis/api/app.py with SIAServer(http.server.HTTPServer) and SIAHandler(http.server.BaseHTTPRequestHandler). Implement: POST /task (accept JSON {text, session_id?, governance_flags?}, run through minimal_pipeline, return result), POST /session/start (create session, return session_id), POST /session/end (consolidate + close session), GET /status (return active concepts, theories, memories count, identity info), GET /health (return {status: 'ok', version: '0.1.0'}). Use json module for request/response. Include CORS headers.

Create tests/test_api.py with: TestHealth (GET /health returns 200 + correct JSON), TestSession (POST /session/start returns session_id, POST /session/end returns confirmation), TestTask (POST /task with text returns result with expected keys), TestLLMAdapter (mock mode works without API key, returns string), TestStatus (GET /status returns counts). Use threading to start/stop server in setUp/tearDown.

Create Virtual_SIA_Legitimate_Thefts_Production_AR.md with thefts 5.63 (OpenRouter Multi-Model Routing: tier-to-model mapping for cognitive economy) and 5.64 (Session-Based Architecture: stateful sessions with lifecycle management from web frameworks). Follow Arabic template exactly.
acceptance_criteria: All API endpoints return correct HTTP status codes and JSON responses
LLM adapter works in mock mode without OPENROUTER_API_KEY
Session lifecycle (create -> use -> consolidate -> close) works end-to-end
tests/test_api.py has at least 6 tests that all pass
No external dependencies used (only stdlib: http.server, json, urllib, threading, os)
All 285+ existing tests continue to pass
Legitimate thefts 5.63 and 5.64 documented in Arabic with correct template
findings: All 297 tests pass (289 existing + 8 new API tests). Server uses port 0 in tests for OS-assigned ports. LLM mock mode works without API key. Session lifecycle with forgetting policy consolidation works end-to-end. No external dependencies used.
